title: Protocol for data collection on drugs use in inpatients
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9vs82","text":"Forms used for data collection in the study entitled: “Risk factors for adverse drug reactions in pediatric inpatients: a cohort study”","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6s52h","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1kars","text":"Forms 1 and 2 must be used in the first pharmaceutical consultation after hospital admission of the patient:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8j6lt","text":"i) form 1 is aimed at obtaining information on the prior history of ADR of the patient; and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8gv5","text":"ii) form 2 is aimed at obtaining information on the prior history of use of the drug.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7sug","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"edobe","text":"Forms 3-6 must be used for the daily recording of information observed in medical prescriptions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"81k83","text":"i) form 3 is used to record potential drug interactions;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a3mmp","text":"ii) form 4 for registration of off-label drugs prescribed;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fu7a8","text":"iii) form 5 for the daily recording of the use of drugs; and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"344bl","text":"iv) form 6 for daily monitoring of prescription errors.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":54,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e0n4h","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8panf","text":"Furthermore, form 7 must be used for the registration of abnormal laboratory tests or other suspected adverse events.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3dl52","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3723m","text":"Forms 1 and 2 must be used in the first pharmaceutical consultation after hospital admission of the patient:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4480s","text":"i) form 1 is aimed at obtaining information on the prior history of ADR of the patient; and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6pjl1","text":"ii) form 2 is aimed at obtaining information on the prior history of use of the drug.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3hjj0","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fjd4c","text":"Forms 3-6 must be used for the daily recording of information observed in medical prescriptions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fjkb","text":"i) form 3 is used to record potential drug interactions;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bdj6n","text":"ii) form 4 for registration of off-label drugs prescribed;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1omk9","text":"iii) form 5 for the daily recording of the use of drugs; and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5qinq","text":"iv) form 6 for daily monitoring of prescription errors.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":54,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e2v1d","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fq0qf","text":"Furthermore, form 7 must be used for the registration of abnormal laboratory tests or other suspected adverse events.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"882jv","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"dejtv","text":"Because this protocol deals with forms, no safet warnings are required.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
